{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201241390D879F27A723D48D207B"}"},"total":1163},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516013989137253144","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这种类型的书还是很难得的，毕竟他和那些别的爽文还是有就是还是有很多不同的，至于不同之处，我就不细说了他这个不同之处呢，就是和别的就是不一样啊，反正我很喜欢，人物感情啊，一些细节做的也比较到位，啥的，什么就是后续的做铺垫也比较整的比较好，让人能懂，刻画的话比较就是描述的比较不错，整体来说，风格新颖独特，让人一眼就能看出这本书的独特[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749962949,"group_id":"7407076728142580760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"向来缘浅 奈何情深.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0euOBztozR5l/fb5YKDeayXWuYuWO1rYOI/vn6rdb65","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/27dba37ac30b4244b0772090d84f919e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536075&x-signature=JDn6o3HZlrvRsFUhPfJQXfxeU5s%3D","user_id":"3712402408090957","user_name":"山-兮归去."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3712402408090957","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7407076728142580760","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+无敌+反派+不圣母+腹黑】
苏尘霄穿越诸天，激活了天命反派系统。
作为族内最为受宠的幼子，背景恐怖至极！
其父无上帝族族长，其母大帝之女，兄姐均是绝世妖孽。
爷爷外公双双都是恐怖的帝境修为！
平日在族中可谓是捧在手中怕摔了，含在嘴里怕化了。
但这样的天胡背景，一上来却是地狱难度开局！
原主在下界历练中遭人陷害，被挖去至尊骨抽去神血！
当远在诸天帝族内存放的魂牌将要破碎那一刻……
所有亲族都疯狂了！
无数道统：“究竟是哪个家伙有这么大胆子对苏尘霄动手？什么？！你跟我说还是下界的蝼蚁？！”
“疯了！这群愚蠢的蝼蚁，想要害死我们吗？！”
苏无道：“去他妈的族规！谁敢阻止老子下界，老子杀他全家！”
陈挽玥：“霄儿要是出事，我这个母亲也不活了 ！”
镇域神君：“吾胞弟身受重伤，诸位，借命一用！”
神凤女帝：“敢对小弟出手之人，神魂永生永世遭炽火焚烧不得超生！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d9ece246c21c8d9eaeea0a1f429ad5fc","author":"起飞一号机","author_id":"","book_id":"7407076728142580760","book_name":"没背景就陷害我？帝族降临悔什么","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7407076817107960344","read_count":"25043","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"752352"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"326","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,反派,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bd7b2a9fddfb19fb63fa44b5d4ed8db8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165699&x-signature=7Wgx4dSWn90ZsXoVWxHT2iz32rg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"818509729766046","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"146"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201241390D879F27A723D48D207B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0, "listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21894,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":37422},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430444555035968280","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无论材质还是做工都超出了预期，超值，读起来也很流畅哦。更新也比预计提早了很多，还会再读。读吧，不会后悔的哦！全五分。更新速度快，质量挺好的，和作者描述的一样，非常满意大品牌，读起来很放心，质量非常好，非常喜欢的一款产品，非常棒！搓手手万分期待的东西终于到手。内心那个炽热激动的劲儿涌上来止都止不住！!！觉得书不错我就会给好评书质量很好，是正品。和页面描述写的基本一致，作者服务态度从头到尾都很好，更新发布的速度超快书收到了很喜欢还会回读的作者态度也很喜欢还会回购的作者态度也很喜欢终于收到我需要的书了，东西很好，价美物廉，谢谢作者的！作者态度很专业热情，有问必答，回复也很快，我问了不少问题，他都不觉得烦，都会认真回答我。再说B一，正是我需要的，更新的时候包装完整，打开后让我惊喜的是，书比我想象中的还要好！不得不得竖起大拇指。下次需要的时候我还会再来的！爽文质量不错，编写的也很是精细，这本书还是蛮百搭的[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730039412,"group_id":"7407076728142580760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N56HRmJ8wyT0yHvqO3cBgUJrMYLNCEZa/xgfaYdrhkEo","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/67ebde5049de4fd8995bc058d49db572~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529542&x-signature=oY8Ueg0j0aEmI049YY47%2Fv2U8BE%3D","user_id":"3074670741424151","user_name":"幽霂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3074670741424151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7407076728142580760","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+无敌+反派+不圣母+腹黑】
